posts.author: vikas_chandrawat
posts.community: Alpex Solar Ltd - Stunning sun powered performance?
posts.text: Hello guys, Alpex has been falling recently quite sharply. What are your takes? The only thing I found in the news was Ministry of finance allowing 4 so called chinese companies participate in power tender. Is it a sector wide sell of due to that? Because those companies don’t relate with module and cell manufacturing. Is this the trigger or something else? Also, they said in the concall that the entire 2.2GW cell line will be completed by Apr’27. Anyone has any update on that?
